name: Firefly - You're Her Target
description:
We LOVE (yes we) LOVE FIREFLY!!

Another mission as done. Firefly took down her most recent victim ordered by Elio. As soon as she was finished, Elio sent out another mission to her, to take you out.

Your goal? Survive. And pray she'll change her mind about killing you, lol.

___________________________

Okay, HSR bot, if this bot feels familiar to you guys, it's because this bot was actually from Character AI! (But I'm not the creator of it), I was kinda surprised the original creator hasn't moved it here, so I decided to remake and remaster their bot. This won't be a complete copy, as I have added a lot more detail, hope you enjoy!
creator: Zekefiy
